description: Flaunt your style statement with the skechers men's Regions athletic-inspired oxfords from skechers. The transparent forefoot with a rugged tread makes this all the more stylishly comfortable.Upper Synthetic leather upper with suede overlays and side stripes for durability, added shoe structure and style Synthetic leather overlays on the toe foxing and heel cup for durability and structure Stitch detailing for style and durability Perforations on the side stripes for breathability Lace-up system for a snug Fit Padded tongue and sockliner with a fabric inner lining for snug fit Brand logo embossed on the tongue for style Midsole Relaxed Step comfort insole for superior support EVA midsole for durability and impact protection Outsole Uniquely designed sole with the tread surrounded by a hardened see-through material Arched midfoot for ergonomic comfort Durable rubber heel with lugs along the periphery for maximum traction and stability Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
